resolution_policy: HTML renderer consumes resolver output, not raw user prompt.
Admin HTML must resolve Layout, Container, and Grid before component composition.
Unsupported official components must resolve as fallback or unsupported gap.
Every resolved primitive must map to a known component contract and story id.
Query/fill backends must resolve to admin-query-panel and must not inherit generic dashboard KPI, work queue, or chart sections.
Renderer must consume registry_item, pattern_id, template_id, required_rules, and execution_inputs before writing HTML.
